channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New data from OpenAI shows consumer ChatGPT users are shifting away from work tasks
item.description: OpenAI ; Chart: Axios Visuals OpenAI released new data Friday showing people are using the consumer version of ChatGPT for more personal tasks and few...

item.title: Why people are buying iPods again
item.description: Grab your corded headphones: People are snapping up Apple's retired MP3 players for nostalgia and a break from smartphones . The big picture: For youn...

item.title: Trump opens the alien files: Why Americans lean into conspiracies
item.description: President Trump vowed this week to release the government's files on aliens and UFOs, the latest instance of declassifying records that have fueled Am...

item.title: Trump raises global tariffs to 15% one day after Supreme Court decision
item.description: President Trump said on Saturday that he would hike global tariffs to 15%, one day after the Supreme Court ruled a bulk of import taxes were illegal. ...

item.title: Supreme Court blunts President Trump's energy weapon
item.description: The Supreme Court's decision striking down many of President Trump's tariffs curbs his power to use energy to pressure trading partners. Why it matter...

item.title: Judges in Virginia name new U.S. attorney, then Justice Dept. fires him
item.description: The nearly immediate removal of longtime litigator James W. Hundley continues a clash over control of one of the country’s highest-profile prosecutor’...

item.title: Spanberger signs bill that could help Democrats gain four House seats
item.description: Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger (D) has signed legislation that includes congressional redistricting maps that could favor Democrats 10-1 if voters p...

item.title: Congress could get a healthy pay raise, courtesy of the courts
item.description: A group of ex-members and veteran lawmakers have advanced an unusual lawsuit that could lead to larger salaries.

item.title: As trade envoy, Prince Andrew promoted Britain and exploited his access
item.description: For a decade, Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, who was arrested on Thursday, advocated globally for U.K. trade, cooking up deals that at times made his fam...

item.title: Trump banner on Justice Dept. building draws authoritarian comparisons
item.description: Democrats criticized the appearance of the president on the headquarters of a department that has long prided itself on being independent from the Whi...

item.title: ‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
